productDisplayName: Swiss Army Women Mountain Water Perfume Set
description: Style Note swiss army present an exclusive gift set with these Mountain Water perfumes and coordinating pocket knives. The 125 year old company have perfected the craft of creating endlessly useful and stylish foldable pocket knives, and they have applied the same attention to detail and focus on perfection when creating their fragrances.Product Details Swiss Army Mountain Water has notes of rock lichens and herbs Swiss Army Mountain Water for Her has top notes of bergamot and neroli middle notes of violet and mate base notes of cedarwood and hay absolute Two Swiss Army knives are included in the setQuantity Swiss Army Mountain Water: 100 ml Swiss Army Mountain Water for Her: 100 ml
